beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lorient vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lorient vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Both Lorient and Strasbourg have four wins each against each other in Ligue 1, along with five draws. Lorient have lost only nine of their 30 Ligue 1 matches this season. If they avoid defeat here, they are guaranteed to record their lowest number of losses in a top-flight campaign since 2009-10, when they lost 12 of their 38 matches.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Rennes vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Rennes vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Johann Lepenant has won 44 tackles for Nantes in Ligue 1 this season, with only Mamadou Sangaré  winning more. Rennes midfielder Mousa Al-Tamari is the only player from the Asian confederation to have been involved in 10 or more goals in the five big European leagues this season.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Paris FC vs Lille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Paris FC vs Lille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lille are the current Ligue 1 side against whom Paris FC have played the most matches in all competitions without ever winning. Paris FC  and Lille  are currently on the longest unbeaten runs in Ligue 1.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Havre AC vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Havre AC vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Le Havre have failed to score in six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against Metz, with Thomas Deniaud’s goal in March 2000 their only strike in that period. Le Havre have lost only one of their last 15 home matches against Metz in all competitions, though that defeat came in their most recent meeting in April 2024 in Ligue 1.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: Al Wakrah vs Al Sailiya - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: France's premier football competition, Ligue 1, is available live and exclusive only on beIN. The 2025–26 Ligue 1 season runs from 15 August 2025 until 16 May 2026.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Brest vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Brest vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Brest have lost each of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lens, their longest current losing streak against any single opponent in the top-flight. Brest have won nine home Ligue 1 matches against Lens, their joint-highest total against any single opponent alongside St Etienne. SB29 have failed to score in only one of these encounters, which was their first in 1979.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: MA Super Ligue 1
beIN SPORTS 4.title: MA Super Ligue 1
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: This week SoAnne is in Nantes. The football challenge will see 6 children compete on a life-size tic-tac-toe board, coached by Johann Lepenant. Pablo Pagis will answer questions from Maeli and Alana for the locker room interview at FC Lorient, and Sidiki has a wonderful surprise in store for his number one fan.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lyon vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lyon vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lyon have lost only one of their last 18 home league matches against Auxerre, a 2-0 defeat in March 2009, which remains the only time they have failed to score against them at home in the top-flight during the 21st century. Lyon are unbeaten in their last 12 league matches against teams currently in the bottom half of the table, though they have drawn their last two such fixtures goalless against Le Havre and Angers.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Ligue 1 legends (Barthez + Nasri) MARSEILLE PREVIOUS STARS Barthez + Nasri
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Ligue 1 legends (Barthez + Nasri) MARSEILLE PREVIOUS STARS Barthez + Nasri
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Many legends have had unforgettable competitions in French stadiums. In this program, we show you their best moments.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Angers have lost each of their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Paris Saint-Germain, the longest losing streak for a single team against the same opponent in top-flight history. Angers have not won any of their last 13 home games against Paris SG in Ligue 1, losing the most recent seven.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: Coventry City vs Wrexham - EFL - English Football League  SkyBet - Championship 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 4.desc:
Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship.
The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system.
The season will run from 8 August 2025 until  2 May 2026.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Manchester City vs Southampton - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Semi Final 1
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Manchester City vs Southampton - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Semi Final 1
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: The Football Association Challenge Cup, more commonly known as the FA Cup, is the oldest national football competition in the world dating back to the 1871-72 season. 736 clubs compete for the chance to lift one of English football's most famous trophies. All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: MA Super Ligue 1
beIN SPORTS 4.title: MA Super Ligue 1
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Toulouse vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Toulouse vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Toulouse have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 19 Ligue 1 matches against Monaco, since a goalless draw in August 2013. Toulouse have lost three of their last four home Ligue 1 matches against Monaco, as many as in their previous 18.
